{{Infobox location
| name = Elder Empire
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Elder]] [[Empire]] is a civilization established following the defeat of the [[Great Elders]], powerful and eternal entities that once enslaved humanity. While these beings possess immense control over fundamental forces such as time, space, [[life]], and death, they are currently considered to be sleeping or contained. [[The Empire]]'s stability has historically been maintained by [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]], who utilizes borrowed [[Elder power]] to achieve a state of immortality and rule above ordinary men. However, following [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s death, the [[Empire]] faces significant political instability and internal fractures among its various [[Guilds]]. The relationship between humanity and the [[Elders]] is a central conflict. Some factions, such as the [[Blackwatch]], focus on studying [[Elder]] biology for defense, while others seek to establish a working relationship to harness their vast wisdom and power. Conversely, many fear the [[Elders]]' true nature as unknowable horrors that seek to reclaim the world and destroy human civilization. The [[Great Elders]] are believed to operate according to specific, focused purposes—such as the pursuit of knowledge, annihilation, or change—and they often use containers to exert their influence. Despite the [[Empire]]'s efforts at containment, [[Elder]] activity and the coordinated movements of their spawn continue to pose a constant threat to [[Imperial]] order.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Elder Empire]] is located in the First Sea.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The text is attributed to the First [[Shadow]] of the [[Elder Empire]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The story takes place in the [[Elder Empire]], Second Sea.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The book is titled 'The [[Elder Empire]], Book Two: [[Shadow]]'.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Elder Empire]] is the name of the series or setting context.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c26">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The story is of the [[Elder Empire]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c27">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Nations and empires]]
